'''zhovakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthinuric|xanthinuric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthinuric|xanthinuric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhovakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovakithi|zhovakithi]] || [[word:zhovakiji|zhovakiji]] || [[word:zhovakishi|zhovakishi]] || [[word:zhovakiki|zhovakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovakuthuthu|zhovakuthuthu]] || [[word:zhovakujuju|zhovakujuju]] || [[word:zhovakushushu|zhovakushushu]] || [[word:zhovakukuku|zhovakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovakuthu|zhovakuthu]] || [[word:zhovakuju|zhovakuju]] || [[word:zhovakushu|zhovakushu]] || [[word:zhovakuku|zhovakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovakufthuf|zhovakufthuf]] || [[word:zhovakufjuf|zhovakufjuf]] || [[word:zhovakufshuf|zhovakufshuf]] || [[word:zhovakufkuf|zhovakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovakethe|zhovakethe]] || [[word:zhovakeje|zhovakeje]] || [[word:zhovakeshe|zhovakeshe]] || [[word:zhovakeke|zhovakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovakothotho|zhovakothotho]] || [[word:zhovakojojo|zhovakojojo]] || [[word:zhovakoshosho|zhovakoshosho]] || [[word:zhovakokoko|zhovakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovakotho|zhovakotho]] || [[word:zhovakojo|zhovakojo]] || [[word:zhovakosho|zhovakosho]] || [[word:zhovakoko|zhovakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovakofthof|zhovakofthof]] || [[word:zhovakofjof|zhovakofjof]] || [[word:zhovakofshof|zhovakofshof]] || [[word:zhovakofkof|zhovakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhovakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhovakĂŠthĂŠ|zhovakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovakĂŠjĂŠ|zhovakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovakĂŠshĂŠ|zhovakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhovakĂŠkĂŠ|zhovakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhovakathatha|zhovakathatha]] || [[word:zhovakajaja|zhovakajaja]] || [[word:zhovakashasha|zhovakashasha]] || [[word:zhovakakaka|zhovakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhovakatha|zhovakatha]] || [[word:zhovakaja|zhovakaja]] || [[word:zhovakasha|zhovakasha]] || [[word:zhovakaka|zhovakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhovakafthaf|zhovakafthaf]] || [[word:zhovakafjaf|zhovakafjaf]] || [[word:zhovakafshaf|zhovakafshaf]] || [[word:zhovakafkaf|zhovakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhovakasha|zhovakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovakshĂ«asha|zhovakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovakroasha|zhovakroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovakmuasha|zhovakmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovakyaasha|zhovakyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovaknkshĂ«asha|gozhovaknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovaknkroasha|gozhovaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovaknkmuasha|gozhovaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovaknkyaasha|gozhovaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhovavakasha|zhovavakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovavakshĂ«asha|zhovavakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovavakroasha|zhovavakroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovavakmuasha|zhovavakmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovavakyaasha|zhovavakyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovavaknkshĂ«asha|gozhovavaknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovavaknkroasha|gozhovavaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovavaknkmuasha|gozhovavaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovavaknkyaasha|gozhovavaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhevĂŠkasha|zhevĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhevĂŠkshĂ«asha|zhevĂŠkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhevĂŠkroasha|zhevĂŠkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhevĂŠkmuasha|zhevĂŠkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhevĂŠkyaasha|zhevĂŠkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠknkshĂ«asha|gozhevĂŠknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠknkroasha|gozhevĂŠknkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠknkmuasha|gozhevĂŠknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhevĂŠknkyaasha|gozhevĂŠknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhovfakasha|zhovfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhovfakshĂ«asha|zhovfakshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhovfakroasha|zhovfakroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhovfakmuasha|zhovfakmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhovfakyaasha|zhovfakyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhovfaknkshĂ«asha|gozhovfaknkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhovfaknkroasha|gozhovfaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhovfaknkmuasha|gozhovfaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhovfaknkyaasha|gozhovfaknkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
